_meta.note: Fire & Blood reconciler output for fab-the-red-dragon-and-the-gold-17-p02 (smoke=False).

edges.quote: the High Council of the Triarchy had accepted his offer of alliance
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Otto Hightower NEGOTIATES_WITH Triarchy

edges.quote: found a fortnight later by his brother Manfryd
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Manfryd Mooton SIBLING_OF Walys Mooton

edges.quote: Prince Jacaerys swept down upon a line of Lysene galleys on Vermax
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Jacaerys Velaryon BONDED_TO Vermax

edges.quote: Addam Velaryon remained aloft, flying Seasmoke around the city walls
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Addam Velaryon BONDED_TO Seasmoke

edges.quote: the admiral of the fleet, Sharako Lohar of Lys
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Sharako Lohar COMMANDS Triarchy

edges.quote: Amongst the slain was Walys Mooton, Lord of Maidenpool
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Sunfyre KILLS Walys Mooton

edges.quote: it was Lord Vance who fell, slain by Ser Adrian Tarbeck
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Adrian Tarbeck KILLS Tristan Vance

edges.quote: dying from a wound given him by Bold Jon Roxton's black blade
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Jon Roxton KILLS Owen Costayne

edges.quote: he drove his sword through Ser Gwayne's belly
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Luthor Largent KILLS Gwayne Hightower

edges.quote: Lord Piper himself knighted the man afterward
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Petyr Piper KNIGHTED_BY Pate of Longleaf

edges.quote: They called themselves the Winter Wolves
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Roderick Dustin COMMANDS Winter Wolves

edges.quote: the two men had become rivals for the affections of the wet nurse Alys Rivers
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Alys Rivers MANIPULATES Criston Cole

edges.quote: In the early morning hours of the fifth day of the 130th year
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Sharako Lohar AGENT_IN Battle in the Gullet

edges.quote: It is said that Jacaerys Velaryon leapt free
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Jacaerys Velaryon VICTIM_IN Death of Jacaerys Velaryon

edges.quote: When their hosts closed around him on the banks of the river Honeywine
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Thaddeus Rowan VICTIM_IN Battle of the Honeywine

edges.quote: Thrice the Lannisters tried to force the crossing
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Tristan Vance VICTIM_IN Battle at the Red Fork

edges.quote: he drove his sword through Ser Gwayne's belly
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Luthor Largent AGENT_IN Death of Gwayne Hightower

edges.quote: he drove his sword through Ser Gwayne's belly
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Gwayne Hightower VICTIM_IN Death of Gwayne Hightower

edges.quote: was the first traitor to be beheaded
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Otto Hightower VICTIM_IN Execution of Otto Hightower

edges.quote: clinging to the neck of his dragon, Stormcloud
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Aegon the Younger BONDED_TO Stormcloud

edges.quote: who had flown Vermithor and Silverwing into battle
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Hugh the Hammer BONDED_TO Vermithor

edges.quote: who had flown Vermithor and Silverwing into battle
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Ulf the White BONDED_TO Silverwing

edges.quote: This unlikely hero died soon after, whilst slaying Adrian Tarbeck
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Harry Penny KILLS Adrian Tarbeck
